title: salvia cuspidata subsp. rosea
intro: Salvia cuspidata subsp. rosea, also known as the pink or rose-colored form of Salvia cuspidata, is a subspecies of flowering plant in the sage family (Lamiaceae). This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, making it useful for wound healing and reducing pain and swelling. The health benefits of Salvia cuspidata subsp. rosea include its ability to support respiratory health, reduce stress and anxiety, and promote digestive health. Herbal preparations of Salvia cuspidata subsp. rosea include teas, infusions, and topical creams, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
